Appetizers.name: Lentil Soup
Appetizers.description: Lentil, wheat flour, onions, potatoes, red chili sauce, and tomato sauce, combined in a veggie broth base and sprinkled with mint

Appetizers.name: Cold Skin Noodle
Appetizers.description: Made from Wheat Flour, Cucumber, Cilantro, Bean Sprouts, and Gluten with Spicy Sauce

Appetizers.name: Chuchura
Appetizers.description: Mini-dumpling soup with minced beef, lamb, and onions, seasoned with black pepper

Appetizers.name: Sigara Boregi
Appetizers.description: Crispy rolls with herby cheese filling and parsley

Appetizers.name: Cold Egg Noodle
Appetizers.description: Made from Flour and Egg with Spicy Sesame, Peanut, Sesame Sauce, and Chili Oil

Appetizers.name: Samsa
Appetizers.description: Oven-baked buns with minced beef, lamb and onions seasoned with black pepper, red pepper and sprinkled with sesame oil

Appetizers.name: Kawa Samsa
Appetizers.description: Butternut squash, onions, red and green bell peppers, black pepper, and house spices stuffed yolk and sesame sprinkled oven-baked buns

Appetizers.name: Chicken Burger
Appetizers.description: The Bun is filled with Chicken, Onion, and Peppers

Appetizers.name: Beef Burger
Appetizers.description: The Bun is filled with Beef, Onion, and Peppers

Appetizers.name: Dolma
Appetizers.description: Traditional Turkish dish that consists of stuffed vegetables, like bell peppers, aubergine, and white wrapped with grape leaves

Rice & Noodles.name: Dolan Laghman
Rice & Noodles.description: Sauteed beef and various combinations of vegetables, beef, and mushroom oyster-flavored sauce topped with hand-pulled chewy noodles

Rice & Noodles.name: Royal Laghman
Rice & Noodles.description: Beef, stir-fried onions, cabbage, mushrooms, green and red peppers, mushroom oyster-flavored sauce, and tomato topped hand-pulled chewy noodles

Rice & Noodles.name: Korma Chop
Rice & Noodles.description: Uyghur-styled signature fried noodles with chives, onions, red bell peppers, and beef or chicken or shrimp. Vegetarian version also available

Rice & Noodles.name: Pearled Noodles
Rice & Noodles.description: Stir-fried pearled noodles with finely cut beef and veggies. Vegetarian version also available

Rice & Noodles.name: Fried Rice
Rice & Noodles.description: White Rice fried with Chicken, salt, sugar, Onion, red and green peppers

Rice & Noodles.name: Signature Rice Noodle
Rice & Noodles.description: Rice noodles prepared with a stir-fry combination of chicken, onions, celery, chili peppers, spicy bean paste, oyster-flavored sauce and house spices

Rice & Noodles.name: Rock Pot Soup
Rice & Noodles.description: Hot pot style soup available with beef or seafood. With Beef: house-made Meatball, Enoki Mushroom, Bok Choy, Tofu, Mung Bean Vermicelli, Cilantro, Scallion and Chili Oil. With Seafood: Shrimp, Fish-Tofu, Enoki Mushroom, Bok Choy, Tofu, Mung Bean Vermicelli, Cilantro, Scallion and Chili Oil

Rice & Noodles.name: Beef Noodle Soup
Rice & Noodles.description: Beef, Onion, Scallion, Cilantro, Green Radish Noodles, and Spicy Chili Oil

Vegetarian Dishes.name: Sour Spicy Shredded Potato
Vegetarian Dishes.description: Potato with peppers, salt, MSG, garlic and vinegar

Vegetarian Dishes.name: Fried Eggplant
Vegetarian Dishes.description: Eggplant braised with red and green bell peppers and onions

Vegetarian Dishes.name: Baby Bok-Choy with Garlic Sauce
Vegetarian Dishes.description: Sauteed baby bok-choy (also known as white cabbage) prepared in our homemade sauce

Vegetarian Dishes.name: Spicy Tofu
Vegetarian Dishes.description: Spicy sauteed tofu prepared with onions, spring onions, and bell peppers in a special house spicy and sour tomato-bean paste

Chef's Specialties.name: Big Plate Chicken
Chef's Specialties.description: Large portions of marinated and sauteed, bone-in chicken with vegetables on a bed of hand-pulled flat noodles, available with mild, spicy, or extra spicy seasonings
Chef's Specialties.notes: Preparation time up to 25 minutes. Extra noodle $7.50

Chef's Specialties.name: Dry Pot
Chef's Specialties.description: Beef, Shrimp, Fishball, Shrimp Ball, Fish Tofu, Squid, Gluten, and Bok Choy served with Spicy Garlic Sauce and two servings of White Rice

Chef's Specialties.name: Piter Manta
Chef's Specialties.description: Uyghur-style steamed buns stuffed with beef and onions, seasoned with black pepper and house spices
Chef's Specialties.notes: Preparation time up to 25 minutes, 6 pieces per serve

Chef's Specialties.name: Kawa Manta
Chef's Specialties.description: Uyghur-style vegetarian steamed buns stuffed with pumpkin, green and red bell peppers, and onions, seasoned with house spices
Chef's Specialties.notes: Preparation time up to 25 minutes, 6 pieces per serve

Chef's Specialties.name: Uyghur Pilaf
Chef's Specialties.description: Steamed rice with carrots and onions, served with protein and a side salad

Chef's Specialties.name: Goshnan
Chef's Specialties.description: Traditional Uyghur-style meat pie stuffed with specially flavored beef and lamb and mixed with onions

Chef's Specialties.name: Kawa Goshnan (Pumpkin)
Chef's Specialties.description: Traditional Uyghur-style fried bread stuffed with butternut squash, onions, red and green bell peppers, seasoned with black pepper and house spices

Chef's Specialties.name: Uyghur Beef Stew
Chef's Specialties.description: Beef, Onion, Carrot, Potato, Bok-choy and Naan

Chef's Specialties.name: Pepper Steak
Chef's Specialties.description: Beef, Onion, Green, and Red pepper served with White Rice

Chef's Specialties.name: Mongolian Beef
Chef's Specialties.description: Beef, Onion, and Scallion served with White Rice

Chef's Specialties.name: Kung Pao Chicken
Chef's Specialties.description: Chicken, Onion, Carrot and Peanut served with White Rice

Chef's Specialties.name: Red Chili Chicken
Chef's Specialties.description: Diced Chicken with Chili Pepper served with White Rice

Kebab.name: Chicken Kebab
Kebab.description: Chunks of boneless chicken marinated in cumin and house spices

Kebab.name: Lamb Kebab
Kebab.description: Chunks of lamb marinated in cumin and house spices served on a skewer

Kebab.name: Whole Lamb Tandoor Kebab
Kebab.description: Tender lamb marinated in olive oil, cumin, coriander, turmeric, smoky paprika, and a hint of cayenne — grilled to perfection for bold, savory flavor

Salad.name: Cucumber Salad
Salad.description: Diced cucumbers, onions, red bell peppers with sesame oil and garlic sauce

Salad.name: Spicy Chicken Salad
Salad.description: Spiced Chicken, Onion, Scallion, and Pepper with Chili Sauce

Salad.name: Dolan Salad
Salad.description: Mixed greens, tomato, cucumber, onion and walnuts with pomegranate sauce

Salad.name: Beef and Tripe Spicy Sauce
Salad.description: Sliced Beef, Tripe, Sesame Sauce, swimming in Chili Oil

Dessert.name: Dolan Cake
Dessert.description: Crafted with white flour, eggs, honey, walnuts, sour cream, buttery cream, and a touch of lemon

Dessert.name: Honey Cake
Dessert.description: Made with wheat flour, honey, eggs, butter, and sour cream

Dessert.name: Baklava
Dessert.description: Fine flour, egg, pistachio, lemon, salt, sugar, and butter. 3 pieces

Dessert.name: Chocolate Cake
Dessert.description: Made with flour, sugar, cocoa powder, eggs, butter, milk, and rich chocolate frosting

Dessert.name: Sutlach
Dessert.description: Creamy rice pudding baked to perfection with a golden caramelized top. A classic and comforting Turkish dessert

Dessert.name: Kazandibi
Dessert.description: Turkish milk pudding with a caramelized, slightly burnt bottom layer

Pot of Tea.name: Dolan/Uyghur Chai
Pot of Tea.description: A mix of organic tea made of rose, red dates, wolfberry and amber crystal sugar

Uyghur Doghap.description: Traditional blended yogurt drink, original salty flavor

Uyghur Doghap.description: Traditional blended yogurt drink, pineapple flavored
